name: ExtensionDevice_Version_InstallDate
title: R5: The date the version was installed on the device (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Device.version.installDate` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Device.version.installDate` 0..1 `dateTime`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Device.version.installDate` 0..1 `dateTime`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Device.version.installDate` has a context of Device.version based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Device`.
Element `Device.version.installDate` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The date the version was installed on the device (new)
